features.featureTitle: Create a new frontend component file `frontend/src/components/WhyVerdraExists.tsx` that implements the full 'Why VerdRa Exists' section with four visual blocks: (1) A bold centered headline 'Cities Are Growing. Nature Is Shrinking.' followed by a powerful short paragraph covering urban expansion, loss of shade, rising heat, pollution, and citizens lacking a structured platform; (2) An 'Our Purpose' sub-section using a split layout — the generated cinematic environmental image on one side and four bullet-style purpose statements on the other ('VerdRa exists to reconnect people with their streets.', 'To restore shade, beauty, and ecological balance.', 'To make urban greening a shared responsibility.', 'To turn pride into participation.'); (3) A 'More Than Just Planting Trees' block with three glassmorphism icon cards — Community Ownership ('Every tree connects a citizen to their city.'), Climate Responsibility ('Reducing heat and improving air quality.'), Legacy Creation ('Trees planted today will stand for decades.') — each with subtle hover lift animations; (4) A centered cinematic closing statement 'This is not a project. / This is a generational commitment.' with a stagger/reveal typography animation. The section background must feature a slow animated greenery gradient with soft light rays and floating leaf particle effects matching the existing HeroSection animation style. All scroll-triggered reveal animations must use the existing `useScrollReveal` hook. Apply the full VERDRA design system: deep forest green palette, Montserrat Bold/SemiBold headings, Poppins body text, glassmorphism panels with soft shadows and green glow highlights, and elegant spacing consistent with the rest of the site.

In `frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx`, import the new `WhyVerdraExists` component and insert it between `ShowcaseCards` and `ContributeSection`. The final top-to-bottom render order must be: HeroSection, ShowcaseCards, WhyVerdraExists, ContributeSection, LifeCycleSection, BenefitsSection, ExpansionVisionSection.

Add a nav link for the 'Why VerdRa Exists' section in `frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx`. The link label should be 'Why VerdRa' and it should smooth-scroll to the WhyVerdraExists section using the same pattern as existing nav links. It must appear between 'Home' and 'Life Cycle' in the nav link order. Apply the same green glow hover effect and underline animation as all other nav links.

Render the newly generated 'Our Purpose' cinematic environmental image (`why-verdra-purpose.dim_900x600.png`) as a static asset in the `WhyVerdraExists` component's split layout section. The image must be loaded from `frontend/public/assets/generated/why-verdra-purpose.dim_900x600.png` and displayed with rounded corners, a subtle green glow border, and a smooth scroll-reveal fade-in.
